# flappy-multiplayer Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2025-09-23

## Active Technologies

- TypeScript/Node.js (server), TypeScript/Next.js (client) + ws (or uWebSockets.js), Next.js, Tailwind, Jes (001-a-real-time)

## Project Structure

```
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test
npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript/Node.js (server), TypeScript/Next.js (client): Follow standard conventions

## Recent Changes

- 001-a-real-time: Added TypeScript/Node.js (server), TypeScript/Next.js (client) + ws (or uWebSockets.js), Next.js, Tailwind, Jes

- 002-the-gameplay-loop: Implemented gameplay loop (rooms, runs, restartable runs, anti-cheat, bots, snapshots v2, engraving window & immutability), governance (registry manifest, protocol version tests), capabilities negotiation integration, scoreboard tie-breaks, and baseline performance instrumentation.
